primary.classes: inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-indigo-600 text-white px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-indigo-700 transition-colors font-medium text-sm disabled:bg-gray-400

primary-sm.classes: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 bg-indigo-600 text-white px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-indigo-700 font-medium text-xs

secondary.classes: px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors

ghost.note: Modal close buttons, toggle icons. Size sm: p-1.5

export.classes: inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-emerald-600 text-white px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-emerald-700 transition-colors font-medium text-sm
export.note: Kept emerald intentionally for export/download semantic distinction

outline.classes: p-2 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 hover:bg-gray-50 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-colors

input.classes: w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 disabled:bg-gray-100 transition-colors

select.classes: px-3 py-2 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500

textarea.classes: w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 resize-none

decisions_approved: TemplateEditor drifts: blue-500 + rounded-md -> indigo-600 + rounded-lg
Emerald kept ONLY for export/download actions (semantic)
